popularStory.headline: Cockayne Families
popularStory.description:
Is there another Old Derbshire family with such memorabilia for the historian, with so many vicissitudes and so many dramatic episodes, as the Cokaynes? 

Derbyshire provides much of the finest scener …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Cokayne於1479年出生在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩 希丘特時，他的父親Thomas Cokayne38歲，母親Agnes Barlow33歲。他於大約1499年與Barbara FitzHerbert在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1537年4月2日在英國英格蘭德比夏爾享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾阿希布恩聖 奧斯瓦爾達斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Cokayne于1479年出生在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩 希丘特时，他的父亲Thomas Cokayne38岁，母亲Agnes Barlow33岁。他于大约1499年与Barbara FitzHerbert在英国德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1537年4月2日在英国英格兰德比夏爾享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾阿希布恩聖 奧斯瓦爾達斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Cokayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cockayne
meanings: English (Midlands and Yorkshire): nickname for a dreamer, from Middle English cokayne ‘cloud-cuckooland’, the name of an imaginary paradise (Old French (pays de) cocaigne, from Middle Low German kōkenje, a diminutive of kōke ‘cake’, since in this land the houses were thought to be made of cake). It may also be a variant of Cocking or from the unflattering Middle English nickname cokin (Old French coquin) ‘disreputable person’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Cokayne was born in 1479, in Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, England, his father, Thomas Cokayne, was 38 and his mother, Agnes Barlow, was 33. He married Barbara FitzHerbert about 1499, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 2 April 1537, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in St Oswald's Church, Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.St. Oswald's Church, Ashbourne, Derbyshi: 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애스h보우른 스트 오스월드'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Cokayne(이)가 1479년 영국 더비실르 애스h보우른 시르c이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Cokayne(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Barlow(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1499년 영국 더비실르에서 Barbara FitzHerbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1537년 4월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 애스h보우른 스트 오스월드'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Cokayne nasceu em 1479, em Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Cokayne, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Barlow, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Barbara FitzHerbert aproximadamente 1499, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de abril de 1537, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em St Oswald's Church, Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Oswald's Church, Ashbourne, Derbyshi: ст освалд'с чурч, ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Cokayne родился в 1479 г. в местности ашбурн сиркуит, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Cokayne было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Barlow, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara FitzHerbert около 1499 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 2 апреля 1537 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности ст освалд'с чурч, ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.
